The beneficiary can avail cashless treatment in any of the RSBY empaneled hospitals under Senior Citizen Health Insurance Scheme (SCHIS). Moreover, the government is also providing two additional covers that will be compensated from existing top-up of RSBY for critical care up to Rs. 1.75 lakh in addition up to Rs. 2.25 lakh for cancer.

scheme_name: Eligibility for Unemployment Allowance Scheme 2017
description: An educated unemployed applicant shall be eligible for the grant of Unemployment Allowance, who fulfills the following criteria:
full_text:
Eligibility for Unemployment Allowance Scheme 2017
An educated unemployed applicant shall be eligible for the grant of Unemployment Allowance, who fulfills the following criteria:

She/he should be unemployed (should not be employed in Govt. sector or in PSUs or in private sector or self employed) and should be a Bonafide Himachali.
She/he should have passed minimum 10+2 from any Board/University/Institution recognized by H.P. Govt.
She/he should be registered with any Employment Exchange in Himachal Pradesh as on the date of application since 1 year.
Her/his annual family income for the Financial Year immediately preceding date of application, from all sources including that of spouse should be less than Rs. 2.00 Lakh (Rs. Two Lakhs).
She/he should be above 20 years and below 35 years of age, as on the date of application.
She/he should not be self-employed.
She/he should not be a dismissed Govt. employee.
She/he should not be convicted of any offence resulting in imprisonment for a period of 48 hours or more.
She/he should not be a regular student pursuing any course.
She/he should not be availing Skill Development Allowance.

scheme_name: Free Steel Water Bottles for 90,000 Govt. School Students in HP
description: CM Jai Ram Thakur announced that free stainless steel water bottles would be provided to around 90,000 class IX students in govt. schools to discourage the use of plastic bottles. This decision is in accordance with the recent Himachal Pradesh plastic ban notification which impose ban on plastic bags, polythene, thermocol plates and plastic made glasses as these materials causes pollution. The state govt. has also banned plastic water bottles of less than one-litre capacity at official functions.
full_text:
Free Steel Water Bottles for 90,000 Govt. School Students in HP
CM Jai Ram Thakur announced that free stainless steel water bottles would be provided to around 90,000 class IX students in govt. schools to discourage the use of plastic bottles. This decision is in accordance with the recent Himachal Pradesh plastic ban notification which impose ban on plastic bags, polythene, thermocol plates and plastic made glasses as these materials causes pollution. The state govt. has also banned plastic water bottles of less than one-litre capacity at official functions.
The state govt. has realized the severity of plastic bag usage in daily life and how it contributed in polluting the environment. The current water crisis has its roots in the usage of plastic and its discriminate dumping in rivers. This distribution of steel water bottles will ensure that plastic and thermocol usage is reduced which in turn would lead to reduction in pollution.

This decision to provide free steel water bottles for 90k govt. school students will be implemented in phases. In the first phase, only class 9th students would be covered which would be extended to other classes in later phases. In the next phases, govt. will cover the students of other classes as well and dept. of education is preparing a proposal for that purpose. Department of food and public distribution will invite tenders for the purchase of stainless steel bottles.

— BJP Himachal Pradesh (@BJP4Himachal) October 7, 2018

There is a proposal to set up 10 solid waste management plants for scientific disposal of waste. A polythene shredder machine will also be installed in Sundernagar and Ghumarwin town. Recently, there was a severe shortage of water in Shimla due to pollution and degradation of water catchment areas, rivers and water bodies. So, pollution reducing plants would be developed in state nurseries and will be provided to the people for plantation. CM Jairam Thakur has also requested tourists visiting the state to use jute or paper bags instead of polythene bags.

scheme_name: Highlights of Senior Citizen Health Insurance Scheme (SCHIS)
description: Below are some of the main features / highlights of the SCHIS
full_text:
Highlights of Senior Citizen Health Insurance Scheme (SCHIS)
Below are some of the main features / highlights of the SCHIS

The benefit of SCHIS is available to senior citizen (above 60 years).
The candidate should be Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojna (RSBY) smart card holder.
The beneficiary has to pay only a nominal annual premium for SCHIS which is up to Rs. 500 per family.
Moreover, Central and State government will share the insurance premium in the ratio of 90:10 under the Trust Model.
In addition, the state government will not issue any separate enrollment process. The beneficiary will be selected only among the smart card holders of RSBY.
The beneficiary can take health care services by showing their health card into any of the RSBY empaneled hospitals.
All the financial transactions between government and insurance company will be done through bank channel. Apart from this, the unspent fund will be refunded at the closing of the financial year.

The candidates can check the name of nearly hospital by clicking on the below link
RSBY Empaneled hospitals

scheme_name: Himachal Pradesh Anubhav Yojana Book Appointment Doctors Online
description: This will provide easy and timely access to proper treatment to the people and will ensure good health of the citizens. All the citizens who have made online registrations for appointment under Anubhav Yojana will also get an SMS. This SMS will be sent to confirm the appointment (date and timings) details. This scheme will benefit 4.5 lakh people in the Kullu district.
full_text:
Himachal Pradesh Anubhav Yojana Book Appointment Doctors Online
This will provide easy and timely access to proper treatment to the people and will ensure good health of the citizens. All the citizens who have made online registrations for appointment under Anubhav Yojana will also get an SMS. This SMS will be sent to confirm the appointment (date and timings) details. This scheme will benefit 4.5 lakh people in the Kullu district.

Anubhav Yojana will also assist people in case the date or timings to meet the doctor are changed. Then they will get the message (SMS) on their registered mobile number regarding the change in date or time. This scheme will enable people to take suggestions and advice from the doctors directly at their fixed timings without any delay.
It is a hassle free process and people will not have to roam here and there and make unnecessary visits at the hospitals to get treatment. CM Jai Ram Thakur has received a warm welcome from the people of Kullu district. On this occasion, Yunus (DC Kullu) and CMO Dr. Sushil Chandra along with other officers were present.

description: The important features and highlights of this Sahara Yojana in Himachal Pradesh are as follows:- For medical treatment, govt. will provide Rs. 3,000 per month to EWS category patients.Serious diseases like paralysis, parkinson, cancer, muscular dystrophy, haemophilia, thalassemia are included. Moreover, chronic renal failure or any other disease which renders a person permanently incapacitated are also included.The main aims is to assist poor patients suffering from fatal diseases to migrate hardships faced during prolonged treatment.In the 1st phase, around 9,471 patients had been covered for which Rs. 14.40 crore were provided in FY 2019. full_text:
Himachal Pradesh Sahara Yojana 2020 Offline Application
The important features and highlights of this Sahara Yojana in Himachal Pradesh are as follows:-
For medical treatment, govt. will provide Rs. 3,000 per month to EWS category patients.Serious diseases like paralysis, parkinson, cancer, muscular dystrophy, haemophilia, thalassemia are included. Moreover, chronic renal failure or any other disease which renders a person permanently incapacitated are also included.The main aims is to assist poor patients suffering from fatal diseases to migrate hardships faced during prolonged treatment.In the 1st phase, around 9,471 patients had been covered for which Rs. 14.40 crore were provided in FY 2019. Now for the FY 2020-21, this scheme will continue to benefit those patients along with new ones.CM Jai Ram Thakur had announced this Sahara Yojana earlier in 2nd HP Budget 2019-20. CMO Office has now officially started this scheme on 11 September 2020 for FY 2020-21 through a tweet on CMO Himachal (@CMOFFICEHP).
A campaign would be launched to popularize the Sahara Yojna. The Accredited Social Health Activists (ASHA) and other health workers would identify beneficiaries and will assist them with prescribed formalities. The HP state govt. will also provide an incentive of Rs. 200 to ASHA workers to encourage participation. Offline application process will be carried out by these Anganwadi workers, Asha workers along with their helpers.

scheme_name: Himachal Pradesh Universal Health Protection Scheme
description: Ayushman Bharat – PM Jan Arogya Yojana is a flagship scheme of the Modi govt. to provide health insurance coverage of Rs. 5 lakh to people from deprived sections. All those people whose name appears in the SECC 2011 list will get free insurance coverage of Rs. 5 lakh for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Interested candidates can apply online at https://hpuhps.com/ for Universal Health Protection scheme.
full_text:
Himachal Pradesh Universal Health Protection Scheme
Ayushman Bharat – PM Jan Arogya Yojana is a flagship scheme of the Modi govt. to provide health insurance coverage of Rs. 5 lakh to people from deprived sections. All those people whose name appears in the SECC 2011 list will get free insurance coverage of Rs. 5 lakh for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Interested candidates can apply online at https://hpuhps.com/ for Universal Health Protection scheme.

People can check their name in the Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana final beneficiaries list and avail free treatment at 175 registered govt. and private empanelled hospitals in the state. This scheme is to ensure the vision of “Health for All” in the state. PMJAY scheme will be implemented in Himachal Pradesh in trust based mode and there is no enrollment required to avail the scheme benefits.
Universal Health Protection Scheme will subsume the Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY) in the state. Moreover, all those citizens who are not covered under this scheme will get included in the Mukhyamantri Swasthya Dekhbhal Yojana in which they will get an increased assistance upto Rs. 5 lakh (previously Rs. 30,000).

मेडिकल कॉलेज नेरचौक में टेलीमेडिसिन सेंटर्स,"मुख्यमंत्री चिकित्सा राहत कोष" योजना और यूनिवर्सल हेल्थ प्रोटेक्शन योजना के शुभारंभ के पश्चात यहाँ भारी जनसमूह को सम्बोधित किया ।स्थानीय जनता को हार्दिक बधाई ।#शिखरकीओरहिमाचल pic.twitter.com/SiwlMcuBzo
— Jairam Thakur (@jairamthakurbjp) October 20, 2018

The state govt. has also launched Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Rahat Kosh Yojana to provide financial assistance to the citizens who are not covered under the social security pension scheme and people will get specialised medical and emergency services round the clock.
CM Jai Ram Thakur has also announced to open Atal Medical and Research University in Ner Chowk medical college. The state govt. will enhance the monthly pay of medical officers appointed on contract basis by Rs. 10,000 per month and that of specialist medical officers on contract basis by Rs. 15,000 per month.

scheme_name: HP Akhand Shiksha Jyoti – Mere School Se Nikle Moti Scheme
description: Himachal Pradesh has made a rapid stride in education as the state has educational institutions even in the remotest areas of state. CM has launched Akhand Shiksha Jyoti – Mere School Se Nikle Moti scheme in govt. school, Bagsiad, where once he was a student. Old students names would be written on the “Roll of Honour board” to motivate current batch students to take inspiration from these alumni. CM announced metalling of roads which leads to the school and announced assistance of Rs. 10 lakh for expansion of school ground. A stadium is also going to be constructed in the school. CM announced Rs. 1 crore to construct an additional building in Bagsiad school and also announced 10 solar lights for Bagsiad bazaar.
full_text:
HP Akhand Shiksha Jyoti – Mere School Se Nikle Moti Scheme
Himachal Pradesh has made a rapid stride in education as the state has educational institutions even in the remotest areas of state. CM has launched Akhand Shiksha Jyoti – Mere School Se Nikle Moti scheme in govt. school, Bagsiad, where once he was a student. Old students names would be written on the “Roll of Honour board” to motivate current batch students to take inspiration from these alumni.
CM announced metalling of roads which leads to the school and announced assistance of Rs. 10 lakh for expansion of school ground. A stadium is also going to be constructed in the school. CM announced Rs. 1 crore to construct an additional building in Bagsiad school and also announced 10 solar lights for Bagsiad bazaar.

The state govt. will provide an assistance of Rs. 51000 for the school in his personal capacity. CM will also provide Rs. 31,000 from his discretionary fund for students performing cultural programme at the occasion. Schools and teachers plays a major role to shape careers of individuals and thus every individual needs to repay back to the institution as gratitude.
CM has also honoured the old students whose name was written on the “School Roll of Honour Board” under this scheme. This scheme aims to motivate students to work hard to achieve new heights in their life. Old students who have excelled in various fields should contribute for development and strengthening of their schools.

description: The important features and highlights of this HP CM Minority Welfare Scheme are as follows:-
full_text:
HP Mukhyamantri Alpsankhyak Kalyan Yojana 2018
The important features and highlights of this HP CM Minority Welfare Scheme are as follows:-

Marriage Grant to Muslim Girls (Rs. 25,000) – The state govt. is going to provide Rs. 25000 as marriage assistance for the girls belonging to the poor Muslim families.
Medical Treatment to Poor Muslim Families (Rs. 5,000) – HP govt. will provide financial assistance of Rs. 5000 for medical treatment of any poor Muslim family.
Social Security Pension to Old, Widow and Disabled Muslims (Rs. 400 p.m) – The state govt. will provide Rs. 400 per month as social security pension to old, widow and disabled people from Muslim community.

Minority people plays an important role in the overall development of the society. All the financial assistance would be provided to the beneficiaries through the Waqf Board.

scheme_name: HP Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Raahat Kosh Yojana
description: Under Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Rahat Kosh Yojana, the citizens would be able to get 24*7 specialised medical and emergency services. The state govt. will provide financial assistance to all those patients who were not covered under the social security pension scheme.
full_text:
HP Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Raahat Kosh Yojana
Under Mukhyamantri Chikitsa Rahat Kosh Yojana, the citizens would be able to get 24*7 specialised medical and emergency services. The state govt. will provide financial assistance to all those patients who were not covered under the social security pension scheme.

"मुख्यमंत्री चिकित्सा राहत कोष योजना" शुरू करने के साथ योजना के तहत विभिन्न लाभार्थियों को निर्धारित राशि के चेक वितरित किए।मरीज व्यक्ति के उपचार के लिए केंद्र सरकार एवं हमारी प्रदेश सरकार ने कल्याणकारी योजनाएं शुरू की हैं। जनता से आग्रह है कि इन योजनाओं का भरपूर लाभ उठाएं। pic.twitter.com/PeQOLENTOz

— Jairam Thakur (@jairamthakurbjp) October 20, 2018

HP govt. will also facilitate the people by enhancing the assistance amount under Mukhyamantri Swasthya Dekhbhal Yojana from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 5 lakh. Now citizens can avail treatment under Mukhya Mantri Swasthya Dekhbhal Yojana at 175 registered government and private health institutes.
Under Himachal Pradesh Universal Health Protection Scheme, each person from economically weaker sections can avail free treatment upto Rs. 5 lakh in any govt. or private empanelled hospitals.
HP CM has also laid the foundation stones of staff quarters of Civil hospital Sundernangar and an overhead foot bridge at Lalit chowk in Sundernagar. The state govt. will also provide digital X-Ray machines for the hospital and will enhance the bed capacity from 100 to 150 beds.
HP govt. will also spend Rs. 30 lakh for the construction of Mukhya Mantri Bhawan in Balh Constituency and upgrading Middle School Sarkidhar to High School.

scheme_name: HP Mukhyamantri Him Seva Helpline Number

full_text:
HP Mukhyamantri Seva Sankalp Helpline Number (1100)
Firstly, any person who is facing any difficulty in work related to any state department can call at 1100. This is a toll free Him Seva Helpline of the HP state govt. to contact CM office directly. On receiving the call at the call center setup by the Himachal Pradesh government, an official attending the call placed at Mukhyamantri Seva Sankalp Helpline number will note down the problem.
Then the official entry of problem would be feed inside the computer data. The problem would then be transferred to the concerned officials for taking action at the earliest. This action must be taken in a time bound manner so that the grievance could be resolved.

After taking suitable action on the problem, complainant will get progress information at their handsets. CM Jairam Thakur will also review the functioning of CM Seva Sankalp Helpline No. every month. In the new call center, various officials will remain present to address grievances of people.

description: The important features and highlights of this CM Yuva Swavalamban Yojana 2020 are as follows:- All the unemployed youths between the age group of 18 to 35 years are eligible under this scheme.Jobless Youths will get subsidy of 25% on machinery on making investment of Rs. 40 lakhs in the industry for their livelihood.Jobless women will get subsidy of 30% on machinery on making investment of Rs. 40 lakhs in the industry for their livelihood.On Loans upto Rs. 40 lakhs, govt. will provide an interest subsidy of 5% for 3 years.Govt. will give its land to the youths on rent at just 1% rate.The govt. will reduce the stamp duty from 6% to 3% on the purchase of land.
full_text:
HP Mukhyamantri Yuva Swavalamban Yojana 2020
The important features and highlights of this CM Yuva Swavalamban Yojana 2020 are as follows:-
All the unemployed youths between the age group of 18 to 35 years are eligible under this scheme.Jobless Youths will get subsidy of 25% on machinery on making investment of Rs. 40 lakhs in the industry for their livelihood.Jobless women will get subsidy of 30% on machinery on making investment of Rs. 40 lakhs in the industry for their livelihood.On Loans upto Rs. 40 lakhs, govt. will provide an interest subsidy of 5% for 3 years.Govt. will give its land to the youths on rent at just 1% rate.The govt. will reduce the stamp duty from 6% to 3% on the purchase of land.
This scheme will ensure that adequate self employment opportunities are created in the state to reduce the unemployment problem. Moreover, each youth will be self sufficient and will become a job creater rather than a jobseeker. The state govt. has made a provision of Rs. 80 crore for the successful implementation of this scheme.

full_text:
HP Sahara Yojana 2020 Eligibility Criteria
All the people who wants to become the HP Sahara Yojana beneficiaries must fulfill the conditions given below:-
Resident of Himachal Pradesh – All the applicants who wish to avail assistance must be a permanent resident of the Himachal Pradesh state.Economically Weaker Sections – All the candidates who belong to economically weaker section (EWS) category and comes below poverty line can avail assistance and treatment.Income Criteria – The annual income of the candidate from all sources, must not exceed Rs. 4 lakh p.a.Diagnosed Patients – Candidates who are on diagnosis must present a proof of their illness to get assistance.
In addition to these, there are around 4200 patients suffering from HIV / AIDS, the state govt. has extended their assistance to Rs. 1500 per month. Moreover, the Himachal Pradesh govt. will also start Mobile Diagnostic Van for identification and treatment of breast and survical cancer.

full_text:
HP Single Use Plastic Buy Back Scheme 2019
CM Jai Ram Thakur of Himachal Pradesh has launched HP Single Use Plastic Buy Back Scheme. At a function organized here to celebrate the birth anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi, CM said that single use plastic (disposable) is not only an environment hazard but also a health threat for humans and animals.
This scheme will encourage people to use environment-friendly bags instead of polythene. HP state govt. has already imposed ban on usage of plastic bags and cutlery made of plastic and thermocol. Jute bags are an alternative to plastic bags.

There is a need to adopt Gandhiji’s humanistic message and ideology in life. This year, the state govt. celebrates 150th birth anniversary of Father of Nation as “Swachhata Hi Seva” campaign. On 2 October 2019, the state govt. also celebrates the day to perform “Shramdaan” to eradicate plastic waste.
Himachal Pradesh is the first state to tackle the threat of plastic and other non-biodegradable waste. The polythene waste collected through various awareness campaigns would be used as an alternative in road construction and as fuel in cement kilns.

Content Source / Reference Link: https://www.news18.com/news/india/himachal-pradesh-starts-scheme-to-buy-back-single-use-plastic-2331217.html

scheme_name: HP Van Samridhi Jan Samridhi Yojana – How Rural People can Earn Money
description: The important features and highlights of this HP Van Samridhi Jan Samridhi Yojana are as follows:-
full_text:
HP Van Samridhi Jan Samridhi Yojana – How Rural People can Earn Money
The important features and highlights of this HP Van Samridhi Jan Samridhi Yojana are as follows:-

HP Van Samridhi Jan Samridhi Yojana will ensure economic returns to rural households who are engaged in collecting and selling of Non-Timber forest produce which includes medicinal plants.
Moreover, govt. will focus on post harvest handling, value addition and marketing.
All the rural people will have to grow medicinal plants on their land. For this, the state govt. will provide 25% subsidy.
When all the herbs are prepared in the forest, then people will call Self Help Groups (SHGs) to take out the medicines.
For these medicines, all the people would get the appropriate prices similar to the market price of that particular herb.
Any person would not be able to take out or steal such medicines from the forests.
The main objective is to provide appropriate prices of the medicinal plants which are grown in the forests of the state. In addition to this, people can sell them at reasonable prices to earn money necessary for their survival.

full_text:

full_text:
MAA Programme 2018 in HP – National Health Mission
All the national health indicators like Infant Mortality Rate (IMR), Maternal Maternity Rate (MMR), Total Fertility Rate (TFR) and under five mortality rate shows decline in the previous years. Health Ministry ‘Strategic approach to Reproductive Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent health (RMNCH+A) is focusing on all life stages. Breastfeeding prevents children from disease, poverty and death and will bring physical and social development.
Husband and other family members must support women for breastfeeding which will provide essential nutrients to child. MAA Programme 2018 will focus on efforts to promote, protect and support optimal breastfeeding and will also provide counselling on child feeding through health systems. As per official data, early breastfeeding will prevent 20% newborn deaths and 13% under 5 children deaths.
This sensitization programme involves allopathic, doctors, Ayush Doctors, Auxiliary Nurse Midwives (ANMs), Anganwadi Workers (AWs) to implement proper breastfeeding. Candidates can see more details on Mother’s Absolute Affection Scheme through the link – MAA Programme PDF

All the citizens of Himachal Pradesh will now get an enhanced assistance under Mukhyamantri Swasthya Dekhbhal Yojana through 175 registered government and private health institutes. full_text:
Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana for BPL Families
The state government is providing a financial assistance of rupees 75,000 under Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana. Under this scheme the government would financially help 1923 BPL (Below Poverty Line) families belonging to the general category for construction of houses. A budget of rupees 25 crore has been earmarked by HP government for the implementation of Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana.

The state government has already built 13808 houses under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana Gramin with a budget of rupees 108.37 crore. 3363 houses were constructed under Rajiv Awas Yojana with a budget of Rupees 33 crore. Another 1515 houses are also being constructed in the current financial year.
13 Cities of the state have been selected under the first phase of Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana including Shimla, Solan, Nahan, Bilaspur, Hamirpur, Una, Mandi, Kullu, Dharamshala, Chamba, Parwanu, Baddi and Nalagarh. Remaining 41 cities will be selected under the second phase of the scheme.

In order to ensure economic and social security for the poor families belonging to general category, the state government would be providing financial assistance to construct home under the Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana. The financial assistance under the scheme would be provided under National Livelihood Mission of Central Government.

scheme_name: Rajiv Thali Yojana
description: After the success of Rajiv Thali Yojana, the concerned department is targeting to provide quality food the passengers of Volvo buses. The price of a single thali would be bit higher for Volvo bus passengers. The department is working on the task of identifying the places where the facility could be stated for Volvo buses.
full_text:
Rajiv Thali Yojana
After the success of Rajiv Thali Yojana, the concerned department is targeting to provide quality food the passengers of Volvo buses. The price of a single thali would be bit higher for Volvo bus passengers. The department is working on the task of identifying the places where the facility could be stated for Volvo buses.

HRTC minster said that, initially, it was difficult for the transport department to find contractors to run the scheme who saw no or marginal profit. In the beginning, nobody had come forward, forcing us to issue the advertisement twice. But now the situations has been changed as they tied-up with unemployed youth and cooperative societies to run the canteens.
As per the information, if a person sells 500 thali in a day then he would save Rs. 2 per plate and his daily income would be Rs. 1,000. In the beginning the main target of Rajiv Thali Yojana at identified bus stands is to end the complaints of overcharging at dhabas. To keep the price of a thali nominal, the government is providing only required infrastructures to run the scheme. Besides, to ensure the food quality at these canteens, HRTC has provided space and HP Civil Supplies Corporation provides utensils under CSR initiative.

Apart from providing food at nominal rates, drinking water packages are also being provided to the customers at Rs. 5 on no-profit basis. Officials of HP Civil Supplies Corporation and HRTC have been assigned a task of ensuring the quality of food in these canteens.
Rajiv Thali Yojana is currently active in few bus stands including, Palampur and Dharamshala of Kangra district, Una and Mandi while it would be made available at identified bus stands of remaining nine districts shortly.

description: Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana is aimed to provide housing subsidy of Rs. 75 thousands to each BPL family in general category. The housing subsidy will be given upon buying/building a new home. The new housing scheme has an outlay of Rs. 25 Crore for the financial year 2016-17. The State Government has been providing housing subsidy to SC/ST and BPL families under Indira Awas Yojna, Rajiv Awas Yojna and under Scheduled Caste Component Plan. full_text:
Subsidy Under Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana
Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana is aimed to provide housing subsidy of Rs. 75 thousands to each BPL family in general category. The housing subsidy will be given upon buying/building a new home.
The new housing scheme has an outlay of Rs. 25 Crore for the financial year 2016-17. The State Government has been providing housing subsidy to SC/ST and BPL families under Indira Awas Yojna, Rajiv Awas Yojna and under Scheduled Caste Component Plan. In the past, houses have been constructed mainly of BPL families of SC STs. The BPL families of General Category have not got sufficient houses, hence the need of new scheme.

New scheme named as ‘Mukhya Mantri Awas Yojana’ will be started from 2016-17 under which BPL families of General categories will be covered.
The state government has proposed to construct 12 thousand houses with an investment of Rs. 97 crore, under various housing schemes during 2016-17.

scheme_name: The important features and highlights of CM Nirog Yojana are as follows
description: HP govt. will provide financial assistance upto Rs. 1 lakh to meritorious students for coaching to secure excellent marks in competitive examinations. All the 12th class students needs proper guidance to perform well in the entrance examinations. So, govt. will assist them in getting coaching in the state or outside the state. Moreover, assistance would be provided to the college students to get coaching for job related examinations. The assistance amount would be given for all the competitive exams conducted by the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) and Staff Selection Commission (SSC).
full_text:
The important features and highlights of CM Nirog Yojana are as follows
All the citizens of the state belonging to any age group can avail the scheme benefits.
The state govt. will provide free medicines to the citizens for all types of diseases.
Mukhyamantri Nirog Yojana will primarily benefit the poor people so that they can get proper treatment on time. Health problems can be identified at the initial stage to provide proper treatment to the people.
Under this scheme, random blood tests, eye check-up, blood pressure test and other tests would be performed absolutely free of cost.
In the initial phase, the state govt. will provide 330 free medicines while 66 medicines are already available.
All the children below 8 years of age will get free injections for insulin and haemophilia.

The important features and highlights of Dev Bhumi Darshan Yojana are as follows
The state govt. will provide relief in travel expenses to senior citizens to enable them to visit sacred places in the state.
All the senior citizens between the age group of 70 to 80 years will get 50% discount in buses while travelling to dev bhumi.
In addition to this, senior citizens who are 80 years or above in age will get full 100% discount in bus travel. They will not have to bear any expense while travelling to holy places under Dev Bhoomi Darshan Yojana.

The important features and highlights of HP Medha Protsahan Yojana are as follows
HP govt. will provide financial assistance upto Rs. 1 lakh to meritorious students for coaching to secure excellent marks in competitive examinations.
All the 12th class students needs proper guidance to perform well in the entrance examinations. So, govt. will assist them in getting coaching in the state or outside the state. Moreover, assistance would be provided to the college students to get coaching for job related examinations.
The assistance amount would be given for all the competitive exams conducted by the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) and Staff Selection Commission (SSC).
Students can apply for coaching to prepare for CLAT, IIT-JEE, AIIMS, AFMC, NEET like competitive examinations.
The total family income of the meritorious students from all sources must not exceed Rs. 2.5 lakh per annum.

These 15 things includes suit, pair of vests (baniyan), velvet cloth, pair of gloves (dastane), pair of socks, massage oil, towel, 6 nappies, mosquito curtain (machardani), blanket, 1 toy. For mothers, there is toothpaste & tooth brush, bathing soap, vaseline and sanitizer.
The items in the distributed baby kits (baby care kits) will have a total cost of around Rs. 1500.
In the FY 2018-19, the state govt. has made a budgetary provision of Rs. 15 crore for this CM Ashirwad scheme.
Around 1 lakh infants would get these baby kits every year.
Only those mothers who give birth to the children in hospitals would be eligible for this scheme. Even such mothers would also get financial assistance of Rs. 700 on the birth of new baby.

Mukhyamantri Ashirwaad scheme has been announced in the HP Budget 2018-19 and is approved by the cabinet committee last month. As per the reports from the official sources, all the technicalities have been completed to start the scheme.

Of all the schemes of Health department announced by CM in the Budget, work on around 90% of the schemes have been completed. All the new born babies who are born in the hospitals will get these kits worth Rs. 1500.

The important features and highlights of this scheme are as follows
HP govt. will provide security amount to get a Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) connection and a gas stove to the poor families.All those households in the state who does not possess the LPG Gas Connections and are not covered under Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) will be covered under this scheme.The primary objective of this scheme is to provide LPG Gas connection facility to all the poor families for at-least 2 years.HP govt. has made a budgetary provision of Rs. 12 crore for the implementation of this scheme.
Govt. also increases the honorarium of officials of Panchayati Raj Institutions. The honorarium for Zila Parishad chairman is increased from Rs. 8,000 to Rs. 11,000 and other members from Rs. 3,500 to Rs. 4,500 per month. Moreover, the anganwari workers will get an honorarium of Rs 4,750, anganwari workers will get Rs. 2,400 and mini anganwari workers will get Rs. 3,300 p.m.

The important features and highlights of this scheme are as follows
This nutrition scheme will provide nutrition supplements to the children tested HIV positive.
Subsequently, CM launches this scheme for HIV affected children during a state level awareness campaign on the occasion of National Youth Day.
Accordingly, it will boost immunity of 400 HIV positive youths up to 18 years of age.
In addition to this, govt. will provide assistance to such children for a better and healthy life.
Furthermore, every expectant mother will have to compulsorily pass the HIV Test so that the virus does not get transmitted to the baby.

AIDS is a serious concern for the state govt. as the number of cases had risen to 5700 in the previous year. Moreover, govt. will lay special emphasis on spreading awareness about this disease at village level in rural and remote areas.

Health dept. along with the help of NGOs and individuals must supplement the efforts to create awareness about HIV. Accordingly, govt. will start an awareness campaign in various schools and colleges. In addition to this, special focus is on organizing plays, street shows to effectively communicate with the masses.

full_text:
This scheme will reduce the risk of Measles and Rubella.
The state govt. of Himachal Pradesh has launched Mukhyamantri Nirog Yojana in order to perform general health check up of the people. This scheme is to be implemented by the health department of the state.

Random tests for blood sugar, blood pressure, eye check-up and other lab check-ups will be performed. These tests will help in the identification of long term problems of the citizens.

full_text:
Unemployment Allowance Scheme 2017
Under the scheme, the state government would provide unemployment allowance of Rs. 1000 per month to every unemployed youth who have passed at least intermediate. Rs. 1500 per month would be provided to such unemployed youth with disability. The Allowance shall be credited to the recipient by RTGS/NEFT/ECS through Banks as mentioned in Application Form, on monthly basis at the cost of the Government.

The state government has decided to launch the unemployment allowance scheme in order to financially help the youth to get skill training and get jobs. The state government is also working towards providing the skill training to such youth and generate employment for them.

scheme_name: Unemployment Allowance Scheme 2017 Application Forms
description: An educated unemployed applicant may make an application on his/her being eligible for the grant of Allowance along with documents mentioned in application form ‘A’ to that Employment Exchange in H.P., where his/her name is registered.
full_text:
Unemployment Allowance Scheme 2017 Application Forms
An educated unemployed applicant may make an application on his/her being eligible for the grant of Allowance along with documents mentioned in application form ‘A’ to that Employment Exchange in H.P., where his/her name is registered.

A duly completed application form may be sent by post or be delivered at that Employment Exchange in H.P., where his/her name is registered.
After the initial filing of claim in the prescribed form ‘A’, every claimant to the Allowance shall be required to submit Affidavit/Self Declaration as per form’C’, in the subsequent month of March to the Employment Exchange where his/her name is registered.
